testcase.name: Playwright website › get started link works
Intentional failures for CI practice › this test passes
Intentional failures for CI practice › this test fails intentionally
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › failing.spec.js:10:3 › Intentional failures for CI practice › this test fails intentionally
Error: expect(page).toHaveTitle(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /This Title Does Not Exist/ Received string: "Fast and reliable end-to-end testing for modern web apps | Playwright" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveTitle" with timeout 5000ms 13 × unexpected value "Fast and reliable end-to-end testing for modern web apps | Playwright"
10 | test('this test fails intentionally', async ({ page }) => { 11 | await page.goto('/'); > 12 | await expect(page).toHaveTitle(/This Title Does Not Exist/); | ^ 13 | }); 14 | 15 | }); at C:\Users\kenia.machaca\practices-ci-cd\playwright-ci-practice\tests\failing.spec.js:12:24
